channel.title: MYB
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MYB, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump Adds A New Chapter To Detroit-Canada Bridge Saga
item.description: For years, there have been efforts for a new U.S. Canada bridge near Detroit. Donald Trump has added a new chapter to the saga.

item.title: 5 Ways AI Is Remaking US Healthcare Today
item.description: AI is becoming the nervous system of the modern health system, shifting the focus from gee-whiz demonstrations to thriving through efficiency.

item.title: An Outbreak, 440 Blood Samples, And One Teen Scientist’s Breakthrough
item.description: Puerto Rico’s 2024 dengue outbreak topped 6,000 cases. A 14-year-old student analyzed 440 blood samples, revealing age-based infection trends that cou...

item.title: Pushing Deeper Into AI Music Creation With Mozart AI
item.description: Mozart AI raises $6 million led by Balderton Capital as the music creation startup launches a mobile app and scales its AI powered audio workstation f...

item.title: The New ‘Overwatch’ Heroes Don’t Have Many Skins Or Other Cosmetics
item.description: The latest Overwatch heroes unfortunately don't have many skins or other cosmetics to unlock just yet.

item.title: Time well spent
item.description: What an admirable goal. Perhaps the overriding goal of all goals. How often do we measure this? Do we even know how? Do the systems we’re in push us f...

item.title: A starting point for the blog
item.description: The challenge of the library is the card catalog. If you don’t know what you’re looking for, it’s hard to find much of anything. The challenge of the ...

item.title: Process thinking
item.description: Sure, you made it work this time, but will it work next time? Can you teach the method to someone else? Do you have a protocol for what to do when it ...

item.title: Free agency
item.description: Unrestricted free choice is a myth. There are always boundaries and trade-offs. But being fully stuck is also a myth. We might not like the trade offs...

item.title: Vessel size
item.description: “May your cup runneth over…” This begs the question: how big a cup? The logistics of vessel size determine how much money we need to raise, how big a ...
